theorem.padded_permanent_side: Theta_{r_n}(ell^(n-m) per_m) != 0 iff 2n<m^2, for m>=3 and n>=m
theorem.orbit_closure: If 2n<m^2 then [ell^(n-m) per_m] is not in closure(GL_{n^2}.[det_n]).
theorem.sharp_method_barrier: At 2n=m^2 the full active Hessian determinant is divisible by the padded form; for 2n>m^2 all critical minors vanish identically.
